why_not_complete: Top-level fixed script-runner surfaces, stale deploy provider execution, browser deterministic-probe naming claims, CLI/contract Manus wording marketing overclaims, fixture-eval production-readiness overclaims, red-team catalog-fixture overclaims, secret-canary value emission, self-improvement dry-run overclaims, release validation evidence overclaims, P5 policy/tool gateway overclaims, P5 HITL fixture overclaims, P5 replay readiness overclaims, Brain safety wording overclaims, and Brain JSON snapshot overclaims are neutralized, but Manus-grade natural-language web-app agent readiness still requires independent production red-team/release evidence plus a real SQLite/dependency-backed Brain kernel.
